channel.title: ESP32 Engine
channel.description: Latest ESP32 project tutorials with wiring guides, Arduino code, and three skill levels.

item.title: Build an Isolated AC Current Monitor Prototype
item.description: Build a bounded ESP32 AC current monitor prototype with an SCT-013 clamp, ADC biasing, calibration limits, and strict mains-safety guidance.

item.title: ESP32-CAM Color Object Detector Demo
item.description: Build a bounded ESP32-CAM color object presence demo with OV2640 RGB565 frames, privacy notes, and clear limits between image processing and AI.

item.title: ESP32 Air Quality Monitor
item.description: An ESP32 monitor that reads an MQ135 gas sensor, prints live raw values, and drives an alert output or fan relay when air quality crosses a tested threshol

item.title: ESP32 BLE Beacon and iBeacon Tutorial
item.description: Build an ESP32 BLE beacon and iBeacon demo with phone scanner testing, UUID, major/minor fields, RSSI behavior, and no extra hardware.

item.title: Build an ESP32-CAM Face Detection Privacy Demo
item.description: Build a local ESP32-CAM face detection demo that distinguishes detection from recognition, with privacy, lighting, memory, and power limits.

item.title: ESP32-CAM QR Code Scanner
item.description: An ESP32-CAM scanner that captures frames and decodes QR codes for access demos, inventory labels, or classroom identification projects. Includes wiring, c

item.title: ESP32 Camera Capture Server
item.description: An ESP32-CAM project that captures images from the OV2640 camera and serves or stores them for inspection, timelapse, or simple monitoring. Includes wiring

item.title: Build a Low-Voltage CNC Motion Controller Demo
item.description: Build a bounded ESP32 CNC motion-control demo with A4988 STEP/DIR wiring, separate motor power, current-limit setup, and safety limits.

item.title: ESP32 Digital Piano
item.description: Build an ESP32 digital piano with capacitive touch keys, I2S audio output, and MIDI over USB. From a simple buzzer piano to a full polyphonic synthesiser with waveform selection.

item.title: ESP32 Distance Monitoring System
item.description: Measure distance with an HC-SR04 on ESP32 using TRIG, ECHO through a voltage divider, and a buzzer alert.

item.title: Build an Educational ECG Waveform Viewer
item.description: Build an educational ESP32 AD8232 waveform viewer with ADC sampling, leads-off checks, battery/isolation guidance, and no medical claims.

item.title: ESP32 Fire Alarm System
item.description: Build an ESP32 fire alarm with MQ-2 smoke sensor and DHT22 temperature sensor. Covers local buzzer alerts, OLED display, and MQTT smart-home integration.

item.title: Build an APDS-9960 Gesture Control Demo
item.description: Build a technically honest ESP32 gesture demo with APDS-9960 I2C wiring, interrupt handling, LED outputs, and false-trigger limits.

item.title: Build a Local NEO-6M GPS Reader
item.description: Build an ESP32 NEO-6M GPS reader with UART wiring, TinyGPS++ parsing, no-fix handling, sky-view guidance, and location privacy limits.

item.title: Build a Low-Voltage Greenhouse Vent Controller
item.description: Build a safe ESP32 greenhouse ventilation prototype with DHT22 readings, OLED status, relay wiring, hysteresis, and low-voltage limits.

item.title: ESP32 Home Climate Automation
item.description: Build a room climate controller that reads environmental data and automatically controls a fan, vent, or humidifier indicator.

item.title: ESP32 IoT Weather Station: BME280 Dashboard and Code
item.description: Build an ESP32 IoT weather station with BME280 temperature, humidity, pressure readings, I2C wiring, Arduino code, and optional OLED or dashboard output.

item.title: Build an ESP32 IR Learning Remote Demo
item.description: Build an ESP32 IR remote demo with TSOP38238 receive wiring, transistor-driven IR LED output, IRremote library code, and compatibility limits.

item.title: ESP32 Learning Trainer Board
item.description: Classroom ESP32 trainer with a push button on GPIO12 and status LED on GPIO14.

item.title: ESP32 LED Matrix Display
item.description: A scrolling LED message display using an ESP32 and a MAX7219 matrix module, with clean SPI wiring and brightness control. Includes wiring, code, troublesho

item.title: ESP32 Lightning Detector: AS3935 Sensor Demo
item.description: Build an ESP32 AS3935 lightning sensor demo with SPI wiring, interrupt handling, OLED output, noise/disturber classification, and official-alert safety limits.

item.title: ESP32 Line Following Robot
item.description: Build a two-motor robot that reads line sensors and steers itself along a dark track.

item.title: ESP32 LoRa Remote Sensor Node (Point-to-Point)
item.description: Build a two-node ESP32 LoRa sensor link with real point-to-point radio, legal frequency checks, antenna safety, and packet validation.

item.title: ESP32 Machine Monitoring Node
item.description: Production-ready walkthrough — Current Sensor signal on GPIO35 drives Relay Output control with a tuned threshold sketch you can deploy today.

item.title: ESP32 Motion Security Alert
item.description: Build a motion alert node that detects movement with a PIR sensor and triggers a buzzer, LED, or Wi-Fi alert.

item.title: ESP32 MQTT Sensor Dashboard
item.description: Build an ESP32 MQTT dashboard that publishes DHT22 temperature and humidity to local broker topics for Node-RED, Home Assistant, MQTT Explorer, or Grafana.

item.title: ESP32 NeoPixel Music Visualizer (Amplitude-Reactive)
item.description: Build a real amplitude-reactive NeoPixel visualizer with an I2S digital microphone, external LED power, and honest no-FFT scope.

item.title: ESP32 OLED Weather Clock
item.description: Build a Wi-Fi clock that shows NTP time and weather-style readings on a crisp OLED display.

item.title: Build an Educational Pulse Oximeter Logger
item.description: Build an educational ESP32 MAX30102 logger with SDA GPIO21, SCL GPIO22, estimated-only output, no-finger suppression, and medical-use warnings.

item.title: ESP32 RFID Access Control System
item.description: Build an RFID access controller that reads cards, compares IDs, and unlocks a low-voltage output for approved tags.

item.title: ESP32 RFID Inventory Tracker
item.description: Build an ESP32 RFID inventory tracker using the RC522 module. Scan asset tags, log check-in and check-out events to SD card, and monitor stock levels from a live web dashboard.

item.title: ESP32 RGB LED Pattern Controller
item.description: Learn PWM color mixing with a single common-cathode RGB LED and a button-driven non-blocking pattern state machine on ESP32.

item.title: ESP32 Educational Servo Arm Controller (3-DOF)
item.description: Build a small joystick-controlled 3-DOF servo arm on ESP32 with safe angle limits, incremental motion, and separate servo power.

item.title: ESP32-CAM Local Network Camera Demo
item.description: Build a local ESP32-CAM camera page with AI-Thinker pin mapping, stable 5 V power, placeholder Wi-Fi credentials, and privacy-first limits.

item.title: ESP32 Smart Door Lock
item.description: Build a safe smart lock prototype using ESP32, an access input, and a low-voltage lock actuator output.

item.title: ESP32 Low-Voltage Energy Meter Demo
item.description: Build a low-voltage ESP32 energy-measurement demonstration using ADC readings and relative power calculations. Not billing grade or for direct mains.

item.title: ESP32 Smart Irrigation System
item.description: Build a plant watering controller that reads soil moisture and switches a pump or valve only when the soil is dry.

item.title: ESP32 Smart Mailbox
item.description: Build an ESP32 smart mailbox that detects mail delivery with a reed switch and sends Telegram notifications. Covers basic alert, ESP-NOW indoor relay, and deep-sleep battery operation.

item.title: ESP32 Smart Parking Sensor
item.description: A parking-bay detector that measures distance with an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor and uses LEDs or a dashboard output to show whether a space is free or occu

item.title: Build a Low-Voltage Smart Power Strip Simulator
item.description: Build a low-voltage ESP32 smart power strip simulator with MOSFET outputs on GPIO25, GPIO26, GPIO27, GPIO33 and no mains wiring.

item.title: ESP32 Smart Street Light
item.description: A light-sensing ESP32 controller that turns a lamp output on at night and can use motion sensing to brighten only when movement is detected. Includes wirin

item.title: ESP32 Smart Thermostat: Temperature Control and Code
item.description: Build a safe low-voltage ESP32 smart thermostat with DHT22 or BME280 readings, GPIO26 relay control, hysteresis, wiring, and Arduino code.

item.title: ESP32 Soil Moisture Monitor
item.description: A plant monitor that reads a capacitive soil sensor, converts raw ADC values into a moisture percentage, and uses LEDs or a buzzer to show when watering is

item.title: Build an Educational Soil pH Monitor
item.description: Build an educational ESP32 soil pH monitor with a conditioning board, GPIO34 ADC1 input, pH 4/pH 7 calibration, and no fertilizer advice.

item.title: ESP32 TinyML Sound Classifier
item.description: Production-ready walkthrough — Microphone Module signal on GPIO32 drives Edge Classifier control with a tuned threshold sketch you can deploy today.

item.title: ESP32 UV Index Monitor (Educational Estimate)
item.description: Build an educational UV-index monitor with a real VEML6075 I2C UV sensor on ESP32, clearly labeled as an estimate and not medical guidance.

item.title: ESP32 Vibration Monitor
item.description: Build an ESP32 vibration monitor with MPU6050 accelerometer. From threshold alerts to FFT spectrum analysis and MQTT predictive maintenance dashboards.

item.title: ESP32 Sound-Triggered Relay Demo
item.description: Build an ESP32 sound-triggered relay demo with an INMP441 I2S microphone, peak detection, and a low-voltage relay load. Not speech recognition.

item.title: ESP32 Water Leak Detector
item.description: A low-voltage water leak alarm that detects moisture on a sensor strip, sounds a buzzer, and can later send alerts over Wi-Fi. Includes wiring, code, troub

item.title: ESP32 WiFi Robot Controller
item.description: Build a browser-controlled ESP32 robot that drives motors from Wi-Fi commands served by the board itself.
